title: Create: Experium ore
description: This mod add a new ore - Experium
body:
## 📜 Description

  **This modification adds a new ore to the game - Experium, this ore is found in Nether, at any altitude. Thanks to this, go to Nether will become even more interesting. If you crush the ore or gem in the crushing wheels, you will get a few experience nuggets.**

## 📝 Contact details

 - **My discord: Donne431#6562 / donne431**
 
 - **Discord server:
   https://discord.gg/NQBhQRDEhF**

- **Donate ☕ - https://www.donationalerts.com/r/donne431**
   
## ‼️ Warning
1. **Please, if you have published this mod on another site, provide a link to *CurseForge* or *Modrinth*, thanks in advance.**
